text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text: Sang jat faai lok aa! Happy birthday, Cheval!

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
I handed my present over to your classmate. I
told them I was simply returning something I
borrowed, but I promise it's actually a present.

text_block_list.name: Cheval Grand
text_block_list.text: Uh... But... Oh, no, it's nothing. Never mind...

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text: Don't be shy! Let's hear what's on your mind.

text_block_list.name: Cheval Grand
text_block_list.text:
I'm probably just overthinking it, but... I kind of
thought you were hiding something.

text_block_list.name: Cheval Grand
text_block_list.text:
You're always so bold. That's why... it seemed a
little strange for you to be so quiet.

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
Well, you don't like making a big fuss out of
things, right? So I kept that in mind for your
present.

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
It's a translated novel I recommend. I read it in
the original language and learned so much!

text_block_list.name: Satono Crown
text_block_list.text:
You're so intelligent, so I know you'll like it. I'd
love to talk about our impressions after too.

text_block_list.name: Cheval Grand
text_block_list.text:
Er... Thanks. Um, so... I'll tell you when I read it...
maybe... No, I will... I'll tell you.
